title: Partners — Anybuild
description: Build systems in hours, reuse ERP/CRM foundations, and extend per client with Anybuild's partner model.

hero.copyHtml:
Build from scratch in hours or reuse an existing system.
Extend and adapt per client as needed.

profiles.title: Developer companies
profiles.text:
Ship systems faster with less setup work.
Focus on logic, not repetition.

profiles.title: Consultancies
profiles.text:
Deliver working systems earlier.
Avoid rebuilding for each client.

profiles.title: Industry experts
profiles.text:
Turn domain knowledge into systems.
Reuse across clients.

buildSection.title: What partners build
buildSection.copyHtml:
Start from scratch or use an existing system.
Both approaches use the same platform and capabilities.

modes.title: Start from scratch
modes.text:
Define requirements.
Generate a system in hours.
Full control from day one.

modes.title: Start from existing
modes.text:
Use ERP/CRM foundation.
Customize per client.
Extend over time.

highlights.title: ERP foundation
highlights.text:
Full business operations.
Finance, inventory, billing, projects.

Linked transactions across the system.
No rekeying. Real-time data.

highlights.title: CRM foundation
highlights.text:
Sales and service in one flow.
Leads, pipelines, support workflows.

From lead to deal to invoice.
Automated processes and insights.

highlights.title: One system
highlights.text:
All parts of the system share the same model.
Data, workflows, UI, and reporting stay aligned.

Changes are consistent across the system.

partnerModel.title: Partner model
partnerModel.copyHtml:
You deliver the solution.
The platform provides infrastructure, runtime, and system capabilities.

items.title: Ownership
items.text: You own the client and solution.

items.title: ISV
items.text:
Build once.
Sell many times.
No infra or billing work.

flow.title: 1. Build
flow.text: Create a system from scratch or start from an existing foundation.

flow.title: 2. Adapt
flow.text: Adjust the system per client requirements and workflows.

flow.title: 3. Extend
flow.text: Continue improving and extending each system over time.

left.title: Traditional
left.text:
Build per project
Repeat setup
Maintain separately per client

right.title: Anybuild
right.text:
Build systems on a shared platform
Reuse where it makes sense
Extend over time

benefits.title: No rebuild
benefits.text: Avoid repeating setup and structure for each project.

benefits.title: System included
benefits.text: Hosting, database, workflows, and reporting are part of the platform.

benefits.title: One model
benefits.text: The system stays consistent across all its parts.

sectionCta.title: Partner with Anybuild
sectionCta.copyHtml: Start building faster with a governed system platform and a reusable delivery model.
